questionText: Seu colega chegou atrasado novamente e você quer expressar sua frustração de forma diplomática. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your dedication, but your late arrivals are affecting our team's workflow.
options: You're always late and it's really annoying.
I appreciate your dedication, but your late arrivals are affecting our team's workflow.
Why do you always come so late?
You need to be more punctual.

questionText: Ao final do dia, você quer resumir suas realizações ao seu chefe. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Today I managed to complete the quarterly report and addressed the client concerns we discussed earlier.
options: I did some stuff today at work.
Today I managed to complete the quarterly report and addressed the client concerns we discussed earlier.
I was busy with work stuff.
I finished everything I had to do.

questionText: Durante uma reunião de manhã, você discorda polida mas firmemente da opinião do diretor. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: While I respect your perspective, I'd like to propose an alternative approach based on the data we've collected.
options: While I respect your perspective, I'd like to propose an alternative approach based on the data we've collected.

questionText: Você precisa pedir ajuda a um colega experiente para uma tarefa complexa. Qual é a melhor forma de solicitar?
correctAnswer: Would you mind sparing some time to help me navigate this challenging project? Your expertise would be invaluable.
options: Would you mind sparing some time to help me navigate this challenging project? Your expertise would be invaluable.
I need your help right now.

questionText: Pela manhã, você está muito ocupado e alguém o interrompe. Como você comunica de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I'm currently swamped with deadlines, but I'd be happy to discuss this after 3 PM if that works for you.
options: I'm currently swamped with deadlines, but I'd be happy to discuss this after 3 PM if that works for you.

questionText: Você cometeu um erro em um projeto importante. Como você o comunica ao seu supervisor?
correctAnswer: I want to bring to your attention a mistake I discovered in the project. I've already identified a solution and am implementing it.
options: I want to bring to your attention a mistake I discovered in the project. I've already identified a solution and am implementing it.
There's a problem with the work I did.

questionText: Você quer expressar que está sobrecarregado de tarefas. Qual frase é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: I'm at capacity with my current workload. Could we prioritize which tasks are most urgent?
options: I'm at capacity with my current workload. Could we prioritize which tasks are most urgent?
I can't do all of this.

questionText: Um cliente insatisfeito o contacta. Como você inicia a conversa?
correctAnswer: Thank you for reaching out. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused and I'm committed to resolving it promptly.
options: Thank you for reaching out. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused and I'm committed to resolving it promptly.

questionText: Você recebe um elogio inesperado de seu chefe. Como você responde adequadamente?
correctAnswer: Thank you for the recognition. I'm grateful for the support of the team and the opportunities you've provided.
options: Thank you for the recognition. I'm grateful for the support of the team and the opportunities you've provided.

questionText: Você precisa recusar um convite social de um colega para focar no trabalho. Como comunica?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the invitation, but I need to dedicate my evening to finishing this pressing assignment. Can we reschedule for next week?
options: I appreciate the invitation, but I need to dedicate my evening to finishing this pressing assignment. Can we reschedule for next week?

questionText: Um colega constantemente fala sobre sua vida pessoal no trabalho. Como você estabelece limites?
correctAnswer: I enjoy our conversations, but I'm finding it challenging to maintain focus on work. Could we catch up during lunch instead?
options: Stop talking about your personal life.
I enjoy our conversations, but I'm finding it challenging to maintain focus on work. Could we catch up during lunch instead?

questionText: Você deseja solicitar um aumento de salário. Como você inicia essa conversa delicada?
correctAnswer: I'd like to discuss my compensation. I've made significant contributions and would appreciate the opportunity to review my role.
options: I'd like to discuss my compensation. I've made significant contributions and would appreciate the opportunity to review my role.

questionText: Você chegou atrasado a uma reunião importante. Como você se desculpa profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: I sincerely apologize for my tardiness. I understand this interrupted the meeting's flow and I'm committed to ensuring it doesn't happen again.
options: I sincerely apologize for my tardiness. I understand this interrupted the meeting's flow and I'm committed to ensuring it doesn't happen again.

questionText: Durante uma apresentação, você comete um pequeno erro e nota a reação do público. Como você lida com a situação?
correctAnswer: I noticed that slight inconsistency—let me clarify that point to ensure we're all aligned on the facts.
options: I noticed that slight inconsistency—let me clarify that point to ensure we're all aligned on the facts.

questionText: Um colega de trabalho está aparentemente estressado. Como você oferece apoio?
correctAnswer: I've noticed you seem overwhelmed lately. Would you be open to discussing it? I'm here if you need support.
options: I've noticed you seem overwhelmed lately. Would you be open to discussing it? I'm here if you need support.

questionText: Você precisa comunicar uma mudança de política no departamento de forma clara. Como inicia?
correctAnswer: I want to inform you all of an important policy update that will take effect next month. Here are the key changes and how they'll impact your daily work.
options: I want to inform you all of an important policy update that will take effect next month. Here are the key changes and how they'll impact your daily work.

questionText: Você está discordando de uma estratégia proposta em uma reunião de gestão. Como você expressa uma visão alternativa com sofisticação?
correctAnswer: While the proposal has merit, I'd like to present a counterargument based on market trends and our previous experience with similar initiatives.
options: While the proposal has merit, I'd like to present a counterargument based on market trends and our previous experience with similar initiatives.

questionText: Um subordinado apresenta resultados abaixo do esperado. Como você comunica expectativas de melhoria?
correctAnswer: I've observed that your recent output hasn't aligned with our standards. I'd like to understand the obstacles you're facing and work together on a performance improvement plan.
options: Your work is not good enough.
I've observed that your recent output hasn't aligned with our standards. I'd like to understand the obstacles you're facing and work together on a performance improvement plan.

questionText: Você precisa negociar prazos com um cliente exigente. Como você equilibra firmeza com diplomacia?
correctAnswer: I understand the urgency of your timeline. However, to ensure the quality you deserve, I'd propose we establish realistic milestones that align with our capacity.
options: We can't do it that fast.
I understand the urgency of your timeline. However, to ensure the quality you deserve, I'd propose we establish realistic milestones that align with our capacity.

questionText: Durante uma discussão sobre recursos orçamentários, você quer propor uma alternativa econômica. Como você a apresenta?
correctAnswer: Rather than pursuing the initially proposed approach, I'd like to suggest a cost-effective alternative that could yield comparable results with better fiscal responsibility.
options: Your budget idea is too expensive.
Rather than pursuing the initially proposed approach, I'd like to suggest a cost-effective alternative that could yield comparable results with better fiscal responsibility.

questionText: Um colega o acusa injustamente de um erro. Como você defende sua posição mantendo profissionalismo?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your concern, but I want to clarify the sequence of events. I have documentation that shows I completed my portion before the issue occurred.
options: I appreciate your concern, but I want to clarify the sequence of events. I have documentation that shows I completed my portion before the issue occurred.

questionText: Você quer motivar seu time após uma semana desafiadora. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: This week presented unprecedented challenges, but I was impressed by your resilience and adaptability. Let's channel that momentum forward.
options: This week presented unprecedented challenges, but I was impressed by your resilience and adaptability. Let's channel that momentum forward.
That was hard but you made it.

questionText: Um cliente exige compensação por um serviço deficiente. Como você responde profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: I fully understand your frustration. Let me propose a resolution that acknowledges the inconvenience and demonstrates our commitment to your satisfaction.
options: I fully understand your frustration. Let me propose a resolution that acknowledges the inconvenience and demonstrates our commitment to your satisfaction.

questionText: Você está conduzindo uma entrevista e o candidato não responde adequadamente. Como você redireciona?
correctAnswer: Let me rephrase that question to clarify what I'm looking for. Can you walk me through a specific example where you demonstrated leadership?
options: Let me rephrase that question to clarify what I'm looking for. Can you walk me through a specific example where you demonstrated leadership?

questionText: Você precisa informar sobre cortes de pessoal na empresa. Como você comunica com sensibilidade?
correctAnswer: I need to share difficult news about organizational changes. Let me be transparent about what this means and the support we're providing during this transition.
options: I need to share difficult news about organizational changes. Let me be transparent about what this means and the support we're providing during this transition.
Some people will lose their jobs.

questionText: Um colega constantemente não cumpre prazos conjuntos afetando você. Como você aborda isso construtivamente?
correctAnswer: I've noticed a pattern where our shared deadlines are being impacted. Could we discuss what's preventing you from meeting them and how we might restructure our collaboration?
options: I've noticed a pattern where our shared deadlines are being impacted. Could we discuss what's preventing you from meeting them and how we might restructure our collaboration?

questionText: Você está apresentando dados desfavoráveis a investidores. Como você framed isso positivamente?
correctAnswer: While these metrics fell short of our projections, they've revealed valuable insights that inform our revised strategy moving forward.
options: While these metrics fell short of our projections, they've revealed valuable insights that inform our revised strategy moving forward.

questionText: Você está solicitando feedback crítico de um mentor sem parecer defensivo. Como aborda?
correctAnswer: I'd genuinely appreciate your candid assessment of my performance. I'm committed to growth and would value your constructive criticism.
options: Tell me what I did wrong.
I'd genuinely appreciate your candid assessment of my performance. I'm committed to growth and would value your constructive criticism.

questionText: Um rival profissional questiona sua expertise publicamente. Como você responde mantendo credibilidade?
correctAnswer: I welcome the opportunity to discuss this further. My experience in this domain is substantiated by our documented results, which I'd be pleased to share.
options: I welcome the opportunity to discuss this further. My experience in this domain is substantiated by our documented results, which I'd be pleased to share.

questionText: Você está consolidando a transição de um projeto complexo para um colega. Como explica as nuances?
correctAnswer: Let me walk you through the critical dependencies and implicit assumptions embedded in this project. These subtleties are essential to avoid operational disruption.
options: Here's what you need to do.
Let me walk you through the critical dependencies and implicit assumptions embedded in this project. These subtleties are essential to avoid operational disruption.
There are some things you should know.

questionText: Você está moderando um debate acalorado entre departamentos. Como você restaura um tom produtivo?
correctAnswer: I appreciate both perspectives. Let's refocus on our shared objective and identify the common ground that can move this discussion forward constructively.
options: I appreciate both perspectives. Let's refocus on our shared objective and identify the common ground that can move this discussion forward constructively.

questionText: Um superior questiona sua metodologia durante uma apresentação de grande importância. Como você responde elegantemente?
correctAnswer: That's an insightful question. While I chose this approach based on specific contextual factors, I'd welcome exploring alternative methodologies post-presentation.
options: That's an insightful question. While I chose this approach based on specific contextual factors, I'd welcome exploring alternative methodologies post-presentation.

questionText: Você descobre que sua ideia foi creditada a outro colega. Como expressa sua preocupação diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: I've noticed the attribution on this initiative seems unclear. While I'm pleased the concept is gaining traction, I'd appreciate clarification regarding authorship for future documentation.
options: I've noticed the attribution on this initiative seems unclear. While I'm pleased the concept is gaining traction, I'd appreciate clarification regarding authorship for future documentation.
You took credit for my work.

questionText: Você está articulando a necessidade de mudança cultural profunda na organização a líderes resistentes.
correctAnswer: The shifts we're contemplating transcend operational optimization; they represent a fundamental recalibration of our organizational DNA to sustain competitive advantage.
options: The shifts we're contemplating transcend operational optimization; they represent a fundamental recalibration of our organizational DNA to sustain competitive advantage.

questionText: Um colega foi promovido e você está genuinamente feliz, mas também lidar com decepção pessoal. Como você se congratula adequadamente?
correctAnswer: Your advancement is thoroughly deserved. While I had hoped for my own progression, I'm genuinely committed to supporting you in this new role.
options: Your advancement is thoroughly deserved. While I had hoped for my own progression, I'm genuinely committed to supporting you in this new role.

questionText: Você está explicando uma falha sistêmica sem culpar indivíduos específicos. Como você estrutura isso?
correctAnswer: The root cause analysis reveals systemic vulnerabilities rather than individual oversights. Let's leverage this opportunity to implement preventative mechanisms organization-wide.
options: The root cause analysis reveals systemic vulnerabilities rather than individual oversights. Let's leverage this opportunity to implement preventative mechanisms organization-wide.

questionText: Você está negociando uma redução orçamentária mantendo moral da equipe. Como comunica?
correctAnswer: While fiscal constraints necessitate reallocation, we'll strategically prioritize initiatives that maximize impact. Your contributions remain invaluable to our trajectory.
options: While fiscal constraints necessitate reallocation, we'll strategically prioritize initiatives that maximize impact. Your contributions remain invaluable to our trajectory.

questionText: Você está calibrando expectativas com um cliente que tem demandas potencialmente irrealistas.
correctAnswer: I'm enthusiastic about your vision. To ensure successful implementation, let's establish a phased approach that validates assumptions while mitigating execution risk.
options: I'm enthusiastic about your vision. To ensure successful implementation, let's establish a phased approach that validates assumptions while mitigating execution risk.
We can't do all of that.

questionText: Você descobre uma discrepância ética sutil nas práticas da empresa. Como levanta isso?
correctAnswer: I've identified a practice that, while not explicitly prohibited, creates ambiguity regarding our ethical commitments. I'd like to discuss realigning our approach.
options: I've identified a practice that, while not explicitly prohibited, creates ambiguity regarding our ethical commitments. I'd like to discuss realigning our approach.

questionText: Você está pedindo desculpas por uma falha anterior que impactou alguém significativamente.
correctAnswer: My mishandling of this situation caused tangible consequences for you. I take full accountability and have implemented measures to prevent recurrence.
options: My mishandling of this situation caused tangible consequences for you. I take full accountability and have implemented measures to prevent recurrence.

questionText: Um colega está em transição de carreira dentro da empresa. Como você oferece mentoraria oferecendo perspectiva?
correctAnswer: Your career transition is compelling. Let me provide candid insights into the nuances of this role, including both opportunities and inherent complexities you'll navigate.
options: Good luck with the new job.
Your career transition is compelling. Let me provide candid insights into the nuances of this role, including both opportunities and inherent complexities you'll navigate.

questionText: Você está argumentando por uma transformação digital que alguns veem com ceticismo. Como você construi credibilidade?
correctAnswer: I acknowledge the legitimate apprehensions regarding this transformation. However, the empirical evidence from comparable organizations demonstrates measurable ROI that offsets transitional disruption.
options: I acknowledge the legitimate apprehensions regarding this transformation. However, the empirical evidence from comparable organizations demonstrates measurable ROI that offsets transitional disruption.

questionText: Você está consolidando feedback crítico de múltiplas partes interessadas para um subordinado.
correctAnswer: The convergent feedback suggests opportunities for developing your executive presence. Let's translate these observations into actionable developmental objectives.
options: The convergent feedback suggests opportunities for developing your executive presence. Let's translate these observations into actionable developmental objectives.

questionText: Você está articulando as implicações de uma decisão estratégica sem disso ter sido consultado.
correctAnswer: While I wasn't part of the initial deliberation, the downstream implications warrant discussion. May I articulate the operational considerations we should anticipate?
options: While I wasn't part of the initial deliberation, the downstream implications warrant discussion. May I articulate the operational considerations we should anticipate?

questionText: Um membro da equipe está sinalizando desengajamento crônico. Como você diagnóstica e responde?
correctAnswer: I've perceived a gradual disengagement that concerns me professionally and personally. Rather than speculate, I'd like to understand what's transpiring and how we might recalibrate.
options: I've perceived a gradual disengagement that concerns me professionally and personally. Rather than speculate, I'd like to understand what's transpiring and how we might recalibrate.

questionText: Você está esclarecendo expectativas não ditas com um novo superior que tem um estilo radicalmente diferente.
correctAnswer: I want to ensure alignment regarding working preferences and communication cadences. Could we establish mutually understood norms that leverage our respective strengths?
options: I want to ensure alignment regarding working preferences and communication cadences. Could we establish mutually understood norms that leverage our respective strengths?
You're not like my last boss.
